# AGENTS.md — Karpathy Coding Harness

This repository uses Karpathy-style coding rules for all AI coding agents.

## Required Behavior

Before changing code:
- Inspect relevant files.
- State the goal and assumptions.
- Choose the smallest safe implementation.

While changing code:
- Make surgical edits only.
- Avoid unrelated refactors.
- Preserve existing style.
- Avoid new dependencies unless required.

After changing code:
- Summarize modified files.
- Explain why the change solves the goal.
- Provide verification steps.
- Mention risks or remaining work.
